creator: jfkimura@yahoo.co.jp
text:
This is asterisk version 1.4 exclusive use.
	Therefore please change a ports name.

Fix: maintainer-update

=== begin cut here ===


MAINTAINER=    jfkimura@yahoo.co.jp
-COMMENT=       Japanese sound files for Asterisk
+COMMENT=       Japanese sound files for Asterisk 1.4

 RUN_DEPENDS=   asterisk:${PORTSDIR}/net/asterisk14

=== ended cut here ===--GBArDN018i2wpwi2PpCmmqc0NthBVBwkzhxeAT8BsbpN9idO
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urN asterisk-sounds.orig/Makefile asterisk14-sounds/Makefile
--- asterisk-sounds.orig/Makefile       2010-11-23 11:31:52.000000000 +0900
+++ asterisk14-sounds/Makefile  2011-02-12 13:24:43.000000000 +0900
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S|s$||}-jp_${PORTVERSION:S|.||}_beta
